body.title: Design database review/edit tools (especially palace trees)
body.result: design doc filed: D-adc-db-review-tools-2026-05-08; 2 child tickets: T-librarian-palace-mcp-tools (S) + T-palace-cli (M, gated)
body.description:
Design a solution for Akien to review, search, browse, and edit the databases — particularly the palace tree structure. Igor has rich query/browse/edit capabilities for his memories; Akien needs equivalent tools for the shared databases (palace, instance tables, etc.). Off-the-shelf tools may work for flat tables, but the hierarchical tree structure of the palace needs custom thinking on traversal, visualization, and editing workflows.

**Affected files:** TBD — discovery step in design phase
**Design rules:** palace-rule-discovery during design; no-sqlite (Postgres only)
**Scope boundary:** Focus on review/browse/edit workflows. Out of scope: real-time sync, multi-user locking, export formats (handle those in follow-up tickets).
**Test plan:** Design doc with mockups/examples of the proposed UI/CLI interaction patterns. No code yet — design only.
